description: Phase 1A: Email Verification, Suppression Lists, and Unsubscribe/CAN-SPAM Compliance. Add Prisma models for email verification status, suppression lists, unsubscribe records, and GDPR consent. Build services for email validation (format + MX lookup + SMTP verify), global/per-campaign suppression list management, one-click unsubscribe (RFC 8058), and CAN-SPAM compliance (physical address in settings, auto-injected unsubscribe links). Add API routes and tests.
steps: 1. Add new Prisma models to apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma: EmailVerification (leadId, email, status: valid/invalid/risky/unknown, mxValid, smtpValid, verifiedAt), SuppressionEntry (email, reason: bounce/unsubscribe/complaint, source, campaignId?), UnsubscribeRecord (leadId, email, reason, unsubscribedAt, ipAddress?), GdprConsent (leadId, consentType, source, givenAt, revokedAt?). Add verificationStatus field to Lead model (valid/invalid/risky/unknown).
2. Create migration file at apps/api/prisma/migrations/20260529000000_add_deliverability_compliance/migration.sql with the SQL for the new models.
3. Add shared types to packages/shared/src/types/index.ts: EMAIL_VERIFICATION_STATUS, SUPPRESSION_REASON, GDPR_CONSENT_TYPE constants and types.
4. Add Zod schemas to packages/shared/src/schemas/index.ts: emailVerificationSchema, suppressionEntrySchema, unsubscribeSchema, gdprConsentSchema, complianceSettingsSchema (physicalAddress field).

5. Create apps/api/src/services/email-verification.ts: verifyEmail(email) function that checks format (regex), MX records (dns.resolveMx), and optionally SMTP verification. Also bulkVerify(emails[]) for list imports. Return {status, mxValid, smtpValid}.

6. Create apps/api/src/services/suppression-list.ts: addToSuppression(email, reason, source), removeFromSuppression(email), isEmailSuppressed(email), importSuppressionList(entries[]), exportSuppressionList(). Auto-add on bounce/complaint events.

7. Create apps/api/src/services/unsubscribe.ts: processUnsubscribe(email, leadId, reason), generateUnsubscribeLink(leadId, messageId), injectUnsubscribeHeaders(email, headers) for RFC 8058 List-Unsubscribe-Post header, getUnsubscribeLandingPage(token).

8. Create apps/api/src/services/gdpr.ts: recordConsent(leadId, type, source), revokeConsent(leadId, type), checkConsent(leadId), exportLeadData(leadId) for right-to-access, deleteLeadData(leadId) for right-to-be-forgotten.

10. Create apps/api/src/routes/suppression.ts: GET /api/suppression (list with pagination), POST /api/suppression (add), DELETE /api/suppression/:id, POST /api/suppression/import, GET /api/suppression/export, GET /api/suppression/check/:email.

11. Create apps/api/src/routes/compliance.ts: POST /api/compliance/unsubscribe/:token (public endpoint - no auth), GET /api/compliance/unsubscribe/:token (landing page data - no auth), GET /api/compliance/gdpr/export/:leadId, DELETE /api/compliance/gdpr/:leadId, GET /api/compliance/consent/:leadId, POST /api/compliance/consent.
12. Update apps/api/src/routes/settings.ts to include physicalAddress field for CAN-SPAM compliance.
13. Register new routes in apps/api/src/index.ts. The unsubscribe endpoint should NOT require auth (public link). GDPR and suppression routes require auth.
14. Update apps/api/src/test/mockDb.ts to add new model mocks: emailVerification, suppressionEntry, unsubscribeRecord, gdprConsent.
15. Add factory functions to apps/api/src/test/factories.ts: buildEmailVerification, buildSuppressionEntry, buildUnsubscribeRecord, buildGdprConsent.
17. Create route test files: apps/api/src/routes/email-verification.test.ts, apps/api/src/routes/suppression.test.ts, apps/api/src/routes/compliance.test.ts.
18. Ensure all tests pass with `npm test` from root.
acceptance_criteria: Prisma schema has EmailVerification, SuppressionEntry, UnsubscribeRecord, GdprConsent models with proper indexes
Email verification service validates format, MX records, and returns status
Suppression list blocks sending to suppressed emails
Unsubscribe endpoint works without authentication (public link)
GDPR export returns all lead data, delete removes all lead data
All new route and service tests pass
Shared types and schemas are exported correctly
verification: Run `npm test` from /projects/sandbox/lead-genius-pre- and confirm all tests pass including new ones
Run `npx tsc --noEmit` in apps/api to confirm no TypeScript errors
